chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 469 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 30.01.2025 Syed Shoa un Nabi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sanaullah Noor Ghori, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Atta Muhammad Azhar, Manager EPZA. Petition is pending since 2019 for orders as to maintainability. Counsel for the respondent places on record a copy of judgment dated 18.12.2024 passed by this court in CP D 886 of 2023 to demonstrate that this petition is not maintainable. In view of the foregoing, this petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
